title: senecio solandri
intro: Senecio solandri, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a bitter tonic and astringent, which can help to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio solandri include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Senecio solandri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to its potential toxicity.
